name: perf-kp-sql
description: Kunpeng + MongoDB joint perf diagnosis. SSH-based collection + 202-case distilled knowledge base (sqlite cases + FTS5 trigram) + flamegraph stack pattern matching + NotebookLM-extension hook. Harness-agnostic (Anthropic Agent Skills standard).

interface.longDescription: SSH-based remote collection (50 OS metrics + 18 mongo runtime), evaluates 44 audited baseline rules against a sqlite knowledge base (FTS5 trigram), and emits an impact-ranked HTML report with authoritative citations (军规 1+2+3+4 全 enforced · OpenAI 反向校验 75% pass rate). First-time use: run /perf-kp-sql-setup to install native deps.
defaultPrompt: 诊断 mongo 数据库性能问题: host=10.0.0.1 user=root privateKeyPath=~/.ssh/id_ed25519
